tasks.check: deno fmt --check && deno lint && deno check backend/main.ts web/src/main.tsx
tasks.compile: deno task build && deno compile --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --include web/dist --allow-env --allow-net --allow-read --allow-run --allow-write -o build/radio-linux-arm64 backend/main.ts
tasks.compile:local: deno task build && deno compile --include web/dist --allow-env --allow-net --allow-read --allow-run --allow-write -o build/radio backend/main.ts
